nodes.label: MandatoryDismantling
nodes.description: The mandatory dismantling data model is intended to ensure that end-of-life vehicles are disposed of properly. It defines components, parts and materials that must be mandatorily dismantled, as well as the necessary provision of information on those components, parts and materials to be dismantled

nodes.label: catenaXId
nodes.description: The fully anonymous Catena-X ID of the serialized part, valid for the Catena-X dataspace.

nodes.label: bpnOEM
nodes.description: The aim of Business Partner Data Management (BPDM) with its BPN is to define a set of rules for a unique ID for cross-company communication and identification of Business Partners.?

nodes.label: substanceOfConcern
nodes.description: Evaluation of the presence of substances of concern (Pb, Hg, Cd, CrVI)

nodes.label: depollutionRequirement
nodes.description: The minimum requirements that must be met during the depollution process.

nodes.label: digitallyCodedComponent
nodes.description: Information on digitally coded components and parts in a vehicle

nodes.label: mandatoryRemoval
nodes.description: Information on items subject to mandatory removal

nodes.label: derivate
nodes.description: The the drivate sepcifies the vehicle architecture.

nodes.label: driveTechnology
nodes.description: The drive tehcnology describes the type of engine

nodes.label: pollutant
nodes.description: Type of pollutant present. "Pb" (Lead), "Hg" (Mercury), "Cd" (Cadmium), "Cr" (Chromium), etc.

nodes.label: number
nodes.description: Number of specific pollutant, component or part.

nodes.label: part
nodes.description: The part or component that contains the specific pollutant.

nodes.label: location
nodes.description: String specifying the location of the pollutant , component or part.

nodes.label: weight
nodes.description: Weight of the pollutant, component or part in grams

nodes.label: minimumConcentration
nodes.description: Minimum weight percentage of pollutant concentration to be dismantled

nodes.label: pollutantConcentration
nodes.description: weight percentage of pollutant concentration

nodes.label: weightOfPart
nodes.description: Weight of part containing pollutant in gram

nodes.label: fluid
nodes.description: Information on the different fluid and liquid available in the asset

nodes.label: component
nodes.description: Information on the different components available in the asset

nodes.label: removalInstruction
nodes.description: String providing technical instructions on removal and replacement, including the sequence of all steps.

nodes.label: functionalityDescription
nodes.description: String describing the functionality, interchangeability, and compatibility with specific parts and components of other makes and models.

nodes.label: manufacturerContact
nodes.description: String indicating the contact point of the manufacturer for technical assistance.
